items.name_en: ЁЯТХIncludes full original green box packagingЁЯТХGGЁЯСЙThe Gucci Cosmogonie series debuted at the historic Castello di Monte in Italy. On the runway, aesthetic elements from different eras and locations complement each other, connecting the past with the present. This new crescent-shaped shoulder bag is a runway piece, drawing inspiration from the brand's heritage elements, crafted in soft leather and featuring the double-G logo that debuted in the 1970s. Red soft leather, shiny gold-tone hardware. Inside: 1 zip pocket. This bag comes with an extra shoulder strap that can be fastened to the bag with a buckle. Adjustable shoulder strap with double-G magnetic snap closure.

Model: 726274.
Size: 39(W)x 38(H)x 2(D)
Color: Red/Original leather.

items.name_en: ЁЯТХWith full original retail packagingЁЯТХуАРNewуАСThe GG Emblem collection reinterprets the brand's iconic pattern with creative design and innovative functions, crafted as a collectible for years to come. This beige and white shoulder bag reinterprets the brand's new small accessories collection, crafted from the new GG monogram fabric. Finished with light pink leather trim and Gucci embossed logo.
items.name_cn:
ЁЯТХWith full original retail packagingЁЯТХуАРNewуАСThe GG Emblem collection reinterprets the brand's iconic pattern with creative design and innovative functions, crafted as a collectible for years to come. This beige and white shoulder bag reinterprets the brand's new small accessories collection, crafted from the new GG monogram fabric. Finished with light pink leather trim and Gucci embossed logo.
Light pink and light pink new GG monogram coated fabric
Light pink leather trim
Webbing taffeta lining
Gucci embossed
Includes D-ring for hanging removable items

Interior: 1 zip pocket, multiple card slots with flat pockets
Adjustable shoulder strap (52cm)
Snap closure
Color: 820688.
Dimensions: 20cm (W) x 12.5cm (H) x 5cm (D)
Weight: approx. 323g
Color: Light pink pvc/Original leather.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: ЁЯТЦ Comes with a complete set of original green box packaging ЁЯТЦ [New] Ophidia Series Mini Backpack. The Ophidia series blends Gucci's traditional heritage with modern design to present a striking new piece. This backpack is crafted from beige and white GG Supreme canvas, featuring a classic webbing design that infuses the brand's essence. An adjustable shoulder strap adds a modern touch. Beige and white GG Supreme canvas, oatmeal leather trim, gold-tone hardware, red and green striped webbing, brown cotton-linen lining, double G handles. Height: 6cm, adjustable leather shoulder strap (length adjustable between 31cm and 35cm). Weight: approx. 0.55kg.
